name: Space-Time Police
name_jp: スペースタイムポリス
desc: When this card is Special Summoned: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; banish that target. When this card leaves the field: Set the card that was banished by this effect to your opponent's side of the field.
mnst_eff: When this card is Special Summoned: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; banish that target. When this card leaves the field: Set the card that was banished by this effect to your opponent's side of the field.
eff: When this card is Special Summoned: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; banish that target. When this card leaves the field: Set the card that was banished by this effect to your opponent's side of the field.

action: Activates if it leaves the field
Sets the opponent's banished cards to the opponent's field
Sets the player's banished cards to the opponent's field
summoning: Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the opponent's field
Special Summons from your banishment to the opponent's field
Sets the opponent's banished cards to the opponent's field
Sets the player's banished cards to the opponent's field
